_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Compared to DKO mice, Nf2 mice were nearly twice [relative risk (RR) = 1.957, 95% confidence interval (CI; 1.301 to 2.992), and P = 0.0016] as likely to be hearing impaired (ABR threshold > 55 dB) at 10 months of age
details: Nf2 mice were nearly twice as likely (RR = 1.957, 95% CI 1.301 to 2.992, P = 0.0016) to be hearing impaired (ABR threshold > 55 dB) at 10 months compared to DKO mice
